title: Poil de carotte
writer: Jules Renard, Julien Duvivier, Jacques Feyder
actors: Henry Krauss, Charlotte Barbier-Krauss, André Heuzé
plot: Nothing can atone for young "Carrot top"s mother's hatred, nor for his father's indifference. But when his father learns that his son is thinking about committing suicide, he steps in and takes him under his wing.
